author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Famitsu’s most wanted games – May 17, 2026 – Pokemon Winds and Waves lead, Splatoon Raiders moves up

It’s time for the latest Famitsu’s most wanted games chart outlining what Japanese gamers are looking forward to based on reader votes.  There’s not really much change here, which isn’t surprising – especially given how quiet things have been due to recent Japanese holidays. Pokemon Winds and Waves are still on top, but Splatoon Raiders has moved up again to...

The post Famitsu’s most wanted games – May 17, 2026 – Pokemon Winds and Waves lead, Splatoon Raiders moves up appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo Switch eShop latest sales: lowest prices ever for Astral Ascent, Devil May Cry, more

A bunch of new sales are up and running on the North American Nintendo Switch eShop. These include the lowest prices ever for Astral Ascent, Devil May Cry, and more. Here’s the full roundup: – A Boy and His Blob – $7.49 (was $14.99) – Afterimage – $3.74 (was $24.99) – Animal Well – $14.99 (was $24.99) – Astral Ascent...

The post Nintendo Switch eShop latest sales: lowest prices ever for Astral Ascent, Devil May Cry, more appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nitro Gen Omega launch trailer – cinematic anime-style RPG debuts on Nintendo Switch

Following its launch this week, Destinybit has come through with a launch trailer for Nitro Gen Omega. The cinematic anime-style RPG found its way to Nintendo Switch just recently. Learn more about the title with the following details: Previously available on Steam in Early Access, the game is set in a post-apocalyptic universe, where machines are ruling the world. Through...

The post Nitro Gen Omega launch trailer – cinematic anime-style RPG debuts on Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
